students.name: Cassidy
students.studentUnderstandings: Cassidy engaged with the number line activity and explained that having two pieces is what makes halves. She participated in skip counting fractions and contributed to the group discussion.

students.name: Bristol
students.studentUnderstandings: Bristol thought about using blocks to space out the number line and suggested labeling a point as one third. She practiced identifying denominators and worked on skip counting fractions with the group.

students.name: Leighton
students.studentUnderstandings: Leighton suggested using blocks to divide the number line and helped move the boxes to find the correct placement for fractions. He participated in the fraction skip counting exercises with the group.

internalFeedback.lessonTitle: Cignition: Fractions on a Number Line (3.NF.A.2)
